recommendations.title: The Band Concert
recommendations.overview: Mickey is trying to lead a concert of The William Tell Overture, but he's continually disrupted by ice cream vendor Donald, who uses a seemingly endless supply of flutes to play Turkey in the Straw instead. After Donald gives up, a bee comes along an

recommendations.title: Santa's Workshop
recommendations.overview: Santa's little helpers must hurry to finish the toys before Christmas Day.

recommendations.title: Peter Pan
recommendations.overview: Leaving the safety of their nursery behind, Wendy, Michael and John follow Peter Pan to a magical world where childhood lasts forever. But while in Neverland, the kids must face Captain Hook and foil his attempts to get rid of Peter for good.
recommendations.director: Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson, Clyde Geronimi

recommendations.title: Chef Donald
recommendations.overview: Donald decides to try cooking along with a radio show.

recommendations.title: Song of the South
recommendations.overview: Uncle Remus draws upon his tales of Br'er Rabbit to help little Johnny deal with his confusion over his parents' separation as well as his new life on the plantation.

recommendations.title: The Black Cauldron

recommendations.title: Der Fuehrer's Face
recommendations.overview: A marching band of Germans, Italians, and Japanese march through the streets of swastika-motif Nutziland, serenading "Der Fuehrer's Face." Donald Duck, not living in the region by choice, struggles to make do with disgusting Nazi food rations and the

recommendations.title: The Grasshopper and the Ants
recommendations.overview: As in the classic fable, the grasshopper plays his fiddle and lives for the moment, while the industrious ants squirrel away massive amounts of food for the winter. With his song, he's able to convince at least one small ant until the queen arrives a

recommendations.title: Saludos Amigos
recommendations.overview: A whimsical blend of live action and animation, "Saludos Amigos" is a colorful kaleidoscope of art, adventure and music set to a toe-tapping samba beat. From high Andes peaks and Argentina's pampas to the sights and sounds of Rio de Janeiro, your int
recommendations.director: Bill Roberts, Hamilton Luske, Jack Kinney, Norman Ferguson, Wilfred Jackson
